results.title: Longford come from behind to beat neighbours Leitrim to Lory Meagher Cup
results.description: Leitrim led by two at the break but shot nine second-half wides as Longford reeled them in

results.title: Brewers moving young pitcher to rookie league to continue rehab
results.description: Quinn Priester's been struggling with his control as he's attempted to return from injury. He'll be in Arizona until he can fully recover.

results.title: Malta's Labour party wins historic fourth term: preliminary count
results.description: Voters in Malta have granted the Labour Party a record-breaking fourth consecutive mandate, according to preliminary results published on Sunday. The result marks a fresh victory for Prime Minister Robert Abela, with early indications showing Labour comfortably aheadView on euronews
